positive: Minimalist abstract forest scene, featuring bold silhouettes of stylized woodland creatures (deer, foxes, owls) interspersed with simplified, geometric representations of leaves and trees. The composition should be centered and circular, optimized for a t-shirt print. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep forest greens, burnt orange, charcoal grey, and creamy off-white. The style should be a high-contrast woodcut engraving meets modern Scandinavian flat design, emphasizing clean lines and negative space. Highly detailed vector graphic quality, suitable for screen printing, high DPI, clean edges, symmetrical composition, bright even lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, gradient, excessive shading
